meta.legacy_mapping_note: Registry field `integration` / `completeness_class` may still use older tokens (`mode_a_complete_mode_b_partial`, `runnable_adjacent`). Map: mode_a runnable paths → adapter_based; strict-import neighbors → import_validated; MODE B partial → import_validated or blocked depending on assets.

baselines.prior_overclaim_risk: Calling MODE A a full s1 reproduction or identical to official s1 training stack.
baselines.safe_wording_now: MODE A is an inference-only budget-forcing adapter on this repo's substrate; near-direct, not official s1 training.
baselines.notes: MODE B uses verify_s1_mode_b_import.py when importing official CSV packages.
